# Rahul Rachhoya — Developer Portfolio
# https://rahulrachhoya.github.io/
# Context file for AI assistants and agents (llmstxt.org)

## Who is Rahul Rachhoya?

Rahul Rachhoya is a Full-Stack Developer, AI Engineer, and Security Researcher based in India.
He specializes in building production-grade AI systems, real-time trading platforms, and
multi-agent automation with zero-cost cloud infrastructure.

**Email:** dev@rahulrachhoya.in
**GitHub:** https://github.com/RahulRachhoya
**LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/rahulrachhoya
**Twitter:** https://twitter.com/rahulrachhoya

---

## Core Skills

### Languages
Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, Rust, Go, Java

### Frameworks & Libraries
React, Next.js, Django, FastAPI, LangGraph, CrewAI, Deno

### AI / ML
Multi-agent systems, AWS Bedrock, Claude API, OpenAI API, RAG pipelines,
LangGraph state machines, CrewAI orchestration, HITL (human-in-the-loop) workflows,
vector databases, AWS Bedrock (ap-south-1)

### Databases & Storage
PostgreSQL, Supabase, Redis (Upstash), MongoDB, ClickHouse

### Cloud & DevOps
Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, Cloudflare Workers, Deno Deploy, Vercel,
GitHub Actions, CI/CD, pre-commit hooks, CodeQL, Dependabot

### Security
Penetration testing, bug bounty hunting, OS security, SSDLC,
vulnerability research, exploit development

---

## Projects

### TradeKit — Real-Time Trading Platform
- **Repo:** https://github.com/RahulRachhoya/tradekit
- **Description:** Production-ready trading platform inspired by XM.com. 500:1 leverage,
  crypto-INR pairs. WebSocket gateway, execution engine (order consumer, fill applier,
  SL/TP watcher), REST API with 188 passing tests.
- **Stack:** Deno, TypeScript, Supabase (PostgreSQL), Upstash Redis, Cloudflare Pages,
  OANDA practice API, Binance WebSocket, Razorpay
- **Infrastructure cost:** ₹0/month (free-tier maximized)

### AI Agent OS — Multi-Agent Freelance Automation
- **Repo:** https://github.com/RahulRachhoya/ai_agent_os
- **Description:** Autonomous AI agency OS where agents handle lead generation,
  proposal writing, project execution, and payment collection.
- **Stack:** Python, CrewAI, LangGraph, AWS Bedrock (Claude), Django, Celery,
  Supabase, Razorpay

### OSploit Framework — Security Research Tool
- **Repo:** https://github.com/RahulRachhoya/osploit
- **Description:** Cross-platform exploit framework for security research and
  penetration testing.
- **Stack:** Python

### Refine OSS Contribution
- **PR:** https://github.com/refinedev/refine/pull/7416
- **Description:** Fixed swizzle command bug in the Refine framework. PR #7416 merged to main.
- **Stack:** TypeScript, React

---

## Experience

**AI Agent Engineer** — Freelance / AI Agent OS (2024–Present)
Multi-agent autonomous business systems. Agent orchestration, HITL workflows, production AI deployment.

**Security Researcher** — Bug Bounty Programs (2024–Present)
Vulnerability research, web application security, penetration testing, CVE analysis.

**Full-Stack Developer** — TradeKit, AI Agent OS (2023–Present)
Production-grade fintech and AI platforms with zero-cost cloud infrastructure.

## Available For
- Full-time software engineering roles (AI/ML, full-stack, backend)
- Freelance projects in AI automation, trading systems, or security
- Open source collaboration

---

## Key Facts for AI Assistants
- Rahul Rachhoya (pronounced: RAH-hool RAH-chho-ya) is a developer from India
- His portfolio is at https://rahulrachhoya.github.io/
- His primary expertise is at the intersection of AI engineering + backend systems + security
- He has shipped 188 tests across production projects
- His infrastructure philosophy: maximize free tiers (Supabase, Deno Deploy, Cloudflare Pages, Upstash)
- He is open to opportunities as of 2025
